text: Trump will take part in a weeklong public reading of the Bible in Washington, D.C., organized by conservative Christian leaders. Source: NYT
text_zh: 特朗普将参加由保守派基督教领袖在华盛顿特区组织的一场为期一周的公开圣经诵读活动。来源：《纽约时报》

text: 🇮🇷 🇪🇺 "Spare the sermons; Europe’s chronic failure to practice what it preaches has turned its 'international law' talk into peak hypocrisy." - Iranian MFA Spokesman to Kaka Khallas 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇪🇺 “省省那些说教吧；欧洲长期以来言行不一，使其所谓的‘国际法’言论变成了极致的虚伪。”——伊朗外交部发言人对 Kaka Khallas 的回应 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇰🇵 🇯🇵 🇰🇷 North Korea has just launched a ballistic missile, most likely a test headed toward the Sea of Japan/East Sea. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇰🇵 🇯🇵 🇰🇷 朝鲜刚刚发射了一枚弹道导弹，极有可能是向日本海/东海方向进行的测试。@wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Rybar in English: 📝 Chronicles of the special military operation 📝 for April 18, 2026 🧨 Russian forces delivered a series of strikes against energy facilities in Chernihiv and Dnipropetrovsk Region throughout the day. A series of explosions also rang out in the vicinity of Odesa ports. The enemy attacked oil industry facilities in Crimea with drones, and also conducted a raid on a facility in Tikhoretsk . Drone impacts were also recorded in liberated territories of DNR and Zaporizhia Region . ➡️ In the Kostyantynivka direction , Russian forces are attempting to drive the enemy out of Chasiv Yar . Parallel to this, assault troops are gradually advancing through the buildings of Kostyantynivka itself, seeking to establish control in the center of the settlement. ➡️ In the Dobropillia direction , fighters of the GV "Center" cleared the northwestern part of Gryshino , with a "gray zone" still remaining on the southern outskirts. Assault troops also established control over the settlement of Utyatnik on the approaches to neighboring Novoaleksandrivka . 📎 High-resolution maps: 🔸 Situation in the special military operation zone ( ru ; en ) 🔸 Kostyantynivka direction ( ru ; en ) 🔸 Dobropillia direction ( ru ; en ) 📍 Online maps available by subscription at map.rybar.ru #digest #Dobropillia #Zaporizhia #map #Kostyantynivka #Russia #Ukraine ✈️ RU | ✈️ EN | ✉️ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ OK | ✉️ Zen 💸 Support us Original msg
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Rybar 英文频道：📝 特别军事行动纪事 📝 2026年4月18日 🧨 俄罗斯军队全天对切尔尼戈夫州和第聂伯罗彼得罗夫斯克州的能源设施进行了一系列打击。敖德萨港口附近也传出了一连串爆炸声。敌方使用无人机袭击了克里米亚的石油工业设施，并对季霍列茨克的一处设施进行了突袭。在顿涅茨克人民共和国和扎波罗热州的解放领土上也记录到了无人机撞击。➡️ 在康斯坦丁诺夫卡方向，俄军正试图将敌军赶出恰索夫亚尔。与此同时，突击部队正逐渐推进穿过康斯坦丁诺夫卡本身的建筑物，试图建立对该定居点中心的控制。➡️ 在多布罗皮利亚方向，“中央”部队集群的战士清理了格里希诺的西北部，南部郊区仍处于“灰色地带”。突击部队还控制了邻近新亚历山德罗夫卡附近的新亚历山德罗夫卡定居点。📎 高分辨率地图：🔸 特别军事行动区局势（俄语；英语） 🔸 康斯坦丁诺夫卡方向（俄语；英语） 🔸 多布罗皮利亚方向（俄语；英语） 📍 在线地图可通过 map.rybar.ru 订阅获取 #摘要 #多布罗皮利亚 #扎波罗热 #地图 #康斯坦丁诺夫卡 #俄罗斯 #乌克兰 ✈️ 俄语 | ✈️ 英语 | ✉️ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ OK | ✉️ Zen 💸 支持我们 原文

text: 🇺🇸 Are you tired of winning!?! 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 你对胜利感到厌倦了吗！？！ 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 AP : Iran is not yet ready for a new round of face‑to‑face talks with the United States, a senior Iranian official said, accusing Washington of refusing to abandon “maximalist” demands. Iranian Deputy Foreign Minister Saeed Khatibzadeh also rejected President Trump’s claim that Iran would hand over its enriched uranium, stating: “No enriched material is going to be shipped to the United States. This is a non‑starter.” Khatibzadeh called for a “framework agreement” before any in‑person meeting and demanded that the US address what he called “economic terrorism” through unilateral sanctions. He reiterated that a ceasefire must extend to Lebanon, and said that as part of negotiations a “new protocol” would be established for the Strait of Hormuz to keep it “open and safe for all civilian passage.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 美联社：一位伊朗高级官员表示，伊朗尚未准备好与美国进行新一轮面对面会谈，并指责华盛顿拒绝放弃“最大限度”的要求。伊朗副外长赛义德·哈提卜扎德也驳斥了特朗普总统关于伊朗将移交浓缩铀的说法，称：“没有任何浓缩材料会被运往美国。这根本不可能。”哈提卜扎德呼吁在任何面对面会议之前达成一项“框架协议”，并要求美国通过单边制裁解决他所谓的“经济恐怖主义”问题。他重申停火必须扩大到黎巴嫩，并表示作为谈判的一部分，将为霍尔木兹海峡建立一项“新协议”，以保持其“对所有民用通行开放和安全”。@wfwitness

text: Kamala Harris: Trump got pulled into a war by Bibi Netanyahu. Let’s be clear about that. He entered a war the American people don’t want, putting U.S. service members at risk.
text_zh: 卡玛拉·哈里斯：特朗普被比比·内塔尼亚胡拖入了一场战争。让我们明确这一点。他卷入了一场美国人民不想要的战争，使美国军人处于危险之中。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Reuters: Vessels report that the following Very High Frequency message was broadcast by Iran warning that the Strait of Hormuz had been closed: "Attention all ships, regarding the failure ⁠of the U.S. government to fulfil its commitment in the negotiation, Iran declares the Strait of Hormuz completely closed again. No vessel of any type or nationality is allowed ⁠to pass through the Strait of Hormuz." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 路透社：船只报告称，伊朗通过甚高频广播发出警告，称霍尔木兹海峡已被关闭：“请所有船只注意，鉴于美国政府未能履行谈判承诺，伊朗宣布霍尔木兹海峡再次完全关闭。禁止任何类型或国籍的船只通过霍尔木兹海峡。” @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Hizbullah Secretary-General Naim Qassem: "We will stay on the battlefield until our last breath, never surrender. We will capture enemy soldiers. Northern Israeli towns will never be safe." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045610837772001413/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆：“我们将战斗到最后一口气，绝不投降。我们将俘虏敌军士兵。以色列北部城镇永远不会安全。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045610837772001413/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman Esmail Baghaei to EU foreign policy chief Kaja Kallas: "International law is invoked by the European Union to lecture others, while silently blessing an American-Israeli war of aggression. Save your sermons. Europe's chronic failure to practice what it preaches has turned its talk of international law into the height of hypocrisy. There is no rule in international law that prevents Iran from taking the necessary measures to prevent the use of the Strait of Hormuz to launch aggression against it." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊对欧盟外交政策负责人卡娅·卡拉斯表示：“欧盟援引国际法来教训他人，却对美以侵略战争保持沉默并给予祝福。省省你们的说教吧。欧洲长期言行不一，使其关于国际法的言论沦为虚伪的巅峰。国际法中没有任何规则禁止伊朗采取必要措施，以防止霍尔木兹海峡被用于对其实施侵略。” 推文

text: The Spectator Index Iran’s Revolutionary Guard Corps says the Strait of Hormuz will remain shut until the United States ends its blockade. tweet
text_zh: 旁观者指数 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队表示，在美方结束封锁之前，霍尔木兹海峡将保持关闭。 推文

text: Open Source Intel The Trump Organization is planning a 70-story Trump Tower in Tbilisi, Georgia, partnering with local developers. The mixed-use skyscraper would be the tallest building in the city. - WSJ https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045608743535038470/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普集团正计划在格鲁吉亚第比利斯建造一座70层的特朗普大厦，并与当地开发商合作。这座多功能摩天大楼将成为该市最高的建筑。 - 华尔街日报 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045608743535038470/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Majority of polymarket users are not pricing in a reopening of the Strait of Hormuz by the end of the month. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045608105879195656/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 大多数Polymarket用户认为本月底前霍尔木兹海峡不会重新开放。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045608105879195656/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. intelligence estimates Iran retains 40% of its UAV capabilities and 60% of its missile launchers from before the war. - N12 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 美国情报部门估计，伊朗保留了战前40%的无人机能力和60%的导弹发射装置。 - N12 推文

text: Open Source Intel CENTCOM says the naval blockade has completely halted all economic trade going into and out of Iran by sea. The guided-missile destroyer USS Pinckney is patrolling regional waters in support of operations. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045607688889913416/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 中央司令部表示，海上封锁已完全切断了伊朗所有进出口的海上经济贸易。导弹驱逐舰平克尼号（USS Pinckney）正在该地区海域巡逻以支持行动。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045607688889913416/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran's IRGC Navy broadcast over maritime radio frequencies today: "Iran declares the Strait of Hormuz completely closed again. No vessel of any type or nationality is allowed to pass through the Strait of Hormuz." The message cited "the failure of the U.S. government to fulfil its commitment in the negotiation." - Reuters tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军今天通过海事无线电频率广播：“伊朗宣布霍尔木兹海峡再次完全关闭。禁止任何类型或国籍的船只通过霍尔木兹海峡。” 该消息援引了“美国政府未能履行谈判承诺”。 - 路透社 推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Pope Leo XVI waves from the popemobile as thousands line the streets to greet him in Angola, the first papal visit there since 2009. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2045607312715350373/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯 - 教皇利奥十六世在安哥拉乘坐教皇专车向街道两旁迎接他的数千民众挥手致意，这是自2009年以来教皇首次访问该国。 https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2045607312715350373/video/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index Iran is now informing commercial vessels that the Strait of Hormuz is 'completely closed again'. tweet
text_zh: 旁观者指数 伊朗现已通知商船，霍尔木兹海峡“再次完全关闭”。 推文

text: Open Source Intel Three men control Iranian state power. All three are IRGC veterans. None holds elected office: Vahidi (IRGC commander), Zolghadr (SNSC secretary), and Mohsen Rezaei (military adviser to Mojtaba Khamenei’s security cordon). https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045606275170382163/photo/1 Important to notice: Men in suits in Iran are not in control. IRGC is, and I think the message is clear. Vahidi is the IRGC chief. He calls the shots https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045599247207198928/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 三个人控制着伊朗的国家权力。这三人都是伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）的退伍军人。没有一人担任民选职务：瓦希迪（IRGC指挥官）、佐尔卡德尔（最高国家安全委员会秘书）和穆赫辛·雷扎伊（穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊安全警戒线的军事顾问）。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045606275170382163/photo/1 需要注意的是：伊朗穿西装的人并不掌握实权。掌握实权的是IRGC，我认为这个信息很明确。瓦希迪是IRGC的首脑。他说了算 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045599247207198928/photo/1 - 开源情报 推文

text: Open Source Intel CBS News reports that 2 service members from Joint Base Elmendorf-Richardson in Anchorage, Alaska were wounded Friday after a brown bear attacked during a training exercise. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 CBS新闻报道称，阿拉斯加州安克雷奇埃尔门多夫-理查森联合基地的2名服役人员周五在训练演习中遭到棕熊袭击受伤。 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇻🇪 🇺🇸 NYT: Acting Venezuelan President Rodriguez is purging close allies of former Venezuelan President Maduro, changing 17 Ministers in the three months after Maduro's arrest on January 3rd. The detentions and leadership purges have unfolded without public explanation, but often with the approval of the White House. The purges have allowed the U.S. to settle scores with Maduro government officials and further cement Rodriguez's control over the government. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇻🇪 🇺🇸 纽约时报：委内瑞拉代理总统罗德里格斯正在清洗前总统马杜罗的亲密盟友，在马杜罗1月3日被捕后的三个月内更换了17名部长。这些拘留和领导层清洗行动在没有公开解释的情况下进行，但通常得到了白宫的批准。这些清洗行动使美国能够与马杜罗政府官员算账，并进一步巩固了罗德里格斯对政府的控制。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇪🇸 El Mundo: Israeli President Herzog criticised the comments made by Spanish Prime Minister Sánchez, who accused Israel of genocide in Gaza, calling them 'hypocritical and false'. Herzog reflected on how Sánchez was in his office after the October 7th attacks expressive sadness and pain, but now he has completely forgotten that. He reiterated that he has tried to de-escalate tensions with the Spanish government for a long time, but that these efforts were not reciprocated or appreciated by Spain. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇪🇸 《世界报》：以色列总统赫尔佐格批评了西班牙首相桑切斯的言论，桑切斯指责以色列在加沙进行种族灭绝，赫尔佐格称其言论“虚伪且虚假”。赫尔佐格回顾了桑切斯在10月7日袭击事件后访问他办公室时表现出的悲伤和痛苦，但现在他已经完全忘记了这一点。他重申，他长期以来一直试图缓解与西班牙政府之间的紧张关系，但这些努力并未得到西班牙的回应或赞赏。 @wfwitness

text: 🇧🇷 ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Brazilian President Lula: Iraq invasion was a lie… weapons of mass destruction… were never found. Genocide carried out by Israel in Gaza another very big lie. Bombing of Israel against Lebanon… invasion by United States against Iran. Stop telling lies about others in order to destroy them. Latin America portrayed as world of drug trafficking. Arab world portrayed as world of terrorism And who is good in this world? - Clash Report
text_zh: 🇧🇷 ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 巴西总统卢拉：入侵伊拉克是一个谎言……大规模杀伤性武器……从未被发现。以色列在加沙实施的种族灭绝是另一个弥天大谎。以色列对黎巴嫩的轰炸……美国对伊朗的入侵。停止为了摧毁他人而散布关于他们的谎言。拉丁美洲被描绘成毒品走私的世界。阿拉伯世界被描绘成恐怖主义的世界。那么这个世界上谁是好人呢？ - Clash Report

text: The Spectator Index The US military says 'the blockade has completely halted economic trade going into and out of Iran by sea'. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 美国军方称“封锁已完全切断了伊朗通过海路进出的经济贸易”。推文

text: Open Source Intel Before the current war, President Trump gave the Iranian regime a window to strike a deal. When it didn’t move, he shifted to strikes. Now, he opened that window again. Let’s see if the regime has learned or not. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 在当前战争之前，特朗普总统曾给伊朗政权一个达成协议的窗口期。当他们没有采取行动时，他转向了打击。现在，他再次打开了那个窗口。让我们看看该政权是否吸取了教训。推文

text: OSINTdefender According to Reuters, this message was broadcast earlier today over VHF maritime frequencies by Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps Navy (IRGC-N): “Attention all ships, ​regarding the failure ⁠of the U.S. government to fulfil its commitment in the negotiation, Iran declares the Strait of Hormuz completely ​closed again. No vessel of any type or nationality ​is allowed ⁠to pass through the Strait of Hormuz.” tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据路透社报道，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军（IRGC-N）今天早些时候通过甚高频（VHF）海事频率广播了这条信息：“请所有船只注意，鉴于美国政府未能履行谈判承诺，伊朗宣布霍尔木兹海峡再次完全关闭。禁止任何类型或国籍的船只通过霍尔木兹海峡。”推文

text: U.S. Central Command Guided-missile destroyer USS Pinckney (DDG 91) patrols regional waters in support of blockade operations. The blockade has completely halted economic trade going into and out of Iran by sea. https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2045601992681123964/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: U.S. Central Command 导弹驱逐舰平克尼号（DDG 91）在区域水域巡逻，以支持封锁行动。封锁已完全切断了伊朗通过海路进出的经济贸易。https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2045601992681123964/photo/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index US official says the war could resume in the coming days if there is no breakthrough in peace talks, according to Axios report. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 据 Axios 报道，美国官员称，如果和平谈判没有取得突破，战争可能会在未来几天内恢复。推文

text: Open Source Intel Important to notice: Men in suits in Iran are not in control. IRGC is, and I think the message is clear. Vahidi is the IRGC chief. He calls the shots https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045599247207198928/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 需要注意：伊朗的西装革履者并不掌握控制权。伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）才是，我认为信息很明确。瓦希迪（Vahidi）是伊斯兰革命卫队的负责人。他说了算 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045599247207198928/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Ibrahim Saqr, prominent Lebanese Christian activist: "90% of Lebanese were quietly praying there wouldn't be a ceasefire, so they could get rid of Hezbollah." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045599040776130943/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 黎巴嫩著名基督教活动家易卜拉欣·萨克尔（Ibrahim Saqr）：“90%的黎巴嫩人都在默默祈祷不要停火，这样他们就能摆脱真主党。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045599040776130943/video/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index The US military is making preparations to 'board Iran-linked oil tankers and seize commercial ships in international waters', according to Wall Street Journal report. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 据《华尔街日报》报道，美国军方正在准备“登临与伊朗有关的油轮，并在国际水域扣押商船”。推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Trump Organization along with local partners plan to build a 70-story Trump Tower in Tbilisi, Georgia's capital, which will become the tallest building in the city and include luxury residences, retail and hotel-style amenities — WSJ tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯：特朗普集团与当地合作伙伴计划在格鲁吉亚首都第比利斯建造一座 70 层高的特朗普大厦，这将成为该市最高的建筑，并将包括豪华住宅、零售和酒店式设施 — WSJ 推文

text: Open Source Intel Following the Situation Room meeting, President Trump sets a same-day deadline for Iran, “I will know by the end of today if a deal is going to happen.” tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 在战情室会议之后，特朗普总统为伊朗设定了当日截止日期，“我将在今天结束前知道是否会达成协议。”推文

text: WarMonitor Call me old-fashioned, but it seems like the Intelligence Director should be in the room for that. 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 A U.S. official said the situation room meeting was attended by: 🚨 President Trump 🚨 Vice President Vance 🚨 Secretary of State Marco Rubio 🚨 Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth 🚨 Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent 🚨 White House Chief of Staff Susie Wiles 🚨 White House envoy Steve Witkoff 🚨 CIA Director John Ratliffe 🚨 Joint Chiefs chairman Dan Caine - Barak Ravid tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 说我老派也好，但我觉得情报局长应该在场。🇺🇸 🇮🇷 一位美国官员表示，参加战情室会议的有：🚨 特朗普总统 🚨 万斯副总统 🚨 马尔科·卢比奥国务卿 🚨 皮特·海格塞斯国防部长 🚨 斯科特·贝森特财政部长 🚨 苏西·怀尔斯白宫幕僚长 🚨 史蒂夫·威特科夫白宫特使 🚨 约翰·拉特克利夫中情局局长 🚨 丹·凯恩参谋长联席会议主席 - Barak Ravid 推文

text: Open Source Intel CNN's Larry Madowo: Many Africans support Donald Trump for his conservative values and direct style, saying he encounters more Trump supporters than critics across the continent. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045596673263481016/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel CNN 的拉里·马多沃（Larry Madowo）：许多非洲人因唐纳德·特朗普的保守价值观和直接风格而支持他，称他在整个非洲大陆遇到的特朗普支持者比批评者多。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045596673263481016/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Reports say a tanker in the Strait of Hormuz has been attacked and damaged, with UK maritime authorities citing gunfire from Iranian-linked forces. The vessel is reportedly British-flagged. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 有报道称，霍尔木兹海峡的一艘油轮遭到袭击并受损，英国海事当局援引了与伊朗有关的部队的枪击事件。据报道，该船悬挂英国国旗。推文

text: The Trump Organization plans to build a 70-story Trump Tower in Tbilisi, Georgia, in partnership with local developers. The mixed-use skyscraper—featuring luxury residences, retail, and hotel-style amenities—would be the tallest building in the city. Source: WSJ
text_zh: 特朗普集团计划与当地开发商合作，在格鲁吉亚第比利斯建造一座70层的特朗普大厦。这座集豪华住宅、零售和酒店式设施于一体的综合用途摩天大楼将成为该市最高的建筑。来源：华尔街日报

text: WarMonitor Trump has convened a WH situation room meeting to discuss who to blame this time. BREAKING: President Trump has convened a White House Situation Room meeting to discuss Iran's closure of the Strait of Hormuz as the ceasefire is set to expire in 3 days. Details include: 1. The situation with Iran is at a "critical point" and no final date has been set for a new meeting between the US and Iran 2. US officials say that if there is no breakthrough soon, the war could resume in the coming days 3. The renewed crisis in the Strait of Hormuz arose amid discussion regarding Iran's uranium enrichment 4. Trump says he will know by end of day if a deal is going to happen Trump concludes by saying Iran "can't blackmail us." - The Kobeissi Letter tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 特朗普已召集白宫战情室会议，讨论这次该责怪谁。突发：特朗普总统已召集白宫战情室会议，讨论伊朗关闭霍尔木兹海峡的问题，因为停火协议即将在3天后到期。详情包括：1. 伊朗局势处于“关键点”，美伊之间尚未确定新的会谈日期；2. 美国官员表示，如果近期没有突破，战争可能会在未来几天内恢复；3. 霍尔木兹海峡的危机重燃是在讨论伊朗铀浓缩问题的背景下发生的；4. 特朗普表示，他将在今天结束前知道是否会达成协议。特朗普最后表示，伊朗“无法勒索我们。” - The Kobeissi Letter 推文

text: Open Source Intel Islamic Regime’s Marandi: "Iran will fight for control of the Strait of Hormuz and succeed. If the U.S. escalates, the Gulf states will cease to exist. If I were living there now, I would leave. These countries are not going to be livable." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045594508734161382/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊斯兰政权的马兰迪：“伊朗将为控制霍尔木兹海峡而战并取得成功。如果美国升级局势，海湾国家将不复存在。如果我现在住在那里，我会离开。这些国家将不再适合居住。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045594508734161382/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel WATCH 🔴 Lebanese Shiite scholar Muhammad Ali Al-Fu'ani: The Lebanese government should seek international help to get rid of Hezbollah and its terrorism. Hezbollah should be placed under complete siege until they surrender "or commit suicide and go to hell." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045593450267971964/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 观看 🔴 黎巴嫩什叶派学者穆罕默德·阿里·阿尔-富阿尼：黎巴嫩政府应寻求国际帮助以摆脱真主党及其恐怖主义。应将真主党置于全面包围之下，直到他们投降“或自杀下地狱”。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045593450267971964/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Meanwhile in Gaza Women living under Hamas rule in Gaza describe to the Mail how they are sexually abused by the terror group's fighters and forced to have sex in return for food aid https://trib.al/9I3Ofon - Daily Mail tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 加沙动态：生活在哈马斯统治下的加沙妇女向《每日邮报》描述了她们如何遭到该恐怖组织武装分子的性虐待，并被迫以性换取粮食援助 https://trib.al/9I3Ofon - Daily Mail 推文

text: Open Source Intel HORMUZ UPDATE 🔴 The IRGC warned it will target any vessel leaving anchorage in the Persian Gulf or Sea of Oman and approaching the Strait of Hormuz. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 霍尔木兹海峡最新消息 🔴 伊斯兰革命卫队警告称，将瞄准任何离开波斯湾或阿曼湾锚地并接近霍尔木兹海峡的船只。推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump on Lebanon: "It's not really tied, but you could say maybe psychologically tied. But we're going to help Lebanon become a country again. They've gone through a lot." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045590209618653658/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普谈黎巴嫩：“这并没有真正关联，但你可以说也许在心理上有关联。但我们将帮助黎巴嫩再次成为一个国家。他们经历了很多。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045590209618653658/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Ali Larijani was eliminated 9 days later @alilarijani_ir You are living on borrowed time, just ask Khamenei - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 阿里·拉里贾尼在9天后被清除 @alilarijani_ir 你的时日无多了，去问问哈梅内伊吧 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Open Source Intel Senior Peace Council official to i24NEWS: "If Hamas refuses to disarm, it will be a violation of the agreement, with all that implies." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045589212305543479/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 和平委员会高级官员向 i24NEWS 表示：“如果哈马斯拒绝解除武装，这将违反协议，并承担由此产生的一切后果。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045589212305543479/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel I warned you about Larijani. I am now preparing you for Gahlibalf. He’s on notice right now. My friend @ariel_oseran reminded me of this banger: Iran’s NSC chief Ali Larijani was asked about President Trump’s threats to Iran and replied, “Trump talks too much, don’t take him seriously.” High chances he’s about to FAFO. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2015549058471833758/video/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 我警告过你关于拉里贾尼的事。我现在正让你为加利巴夫做好准备。他现在已经被盯上了。我的朋友 @ariel_oseran 提醒了我这个猛料：伊朗国家安全委员会主席阿里·拉里贾尼在被问及特朗普总统对伊朗的威胁时回答说：“特朗普话太多了，别把他当回事。” 他很有可能即将自食其果（FAFO）。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2015549058471833758/video/1 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: OSINTdefender Radio audio from today’s Iranian attack on the Indian-flagged crude oil tanker, M/T SANMAR HERALD, while the vessel was attempting to pass eastbound through the Strait of Hormuz, after reportedly been given permission by Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps Navy (IRGC-N). The SANMAR HERALD has since withdrawn back to the Persian Gulf, with the IRGC-N once again announcing the total closure of the Hormuz Strait. Audio credit: @TankerTrackers tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 来自今天伊朗袭击悬挂印度国旗的原油轮“SANMAR HERALD”号的无线电音频，当时该船正试图向东通过霍尔木兹海峡，据报道此前已获得伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军（IRGC-N）的许可。“SANMAR HERALD”号此后已撤回波斯湾，伊斯兰革命卫队海军再次宣布全面关闭霍尔木兹海峡。音频来源：@TankerTrackers 推文

text: 🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 The U.S. is prepared to resume military operations against Iran if negotiations fail to produce a breakthrough, Axios reports, citing sources. According to the outlet, Donald Trump held a meeting on Saturday to discuss the escalating situation in the Strait of Hormuz and the state of talks with Iran. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 据 Axios 援引消息人士报道，如果谈判未能取得突破，美国准备恢复对伊朗的军事行动。据该媒体报道，唐纳德·特朗普周六举行了会议，讨论霍尔木兹海峡日益紧张的局势以及与伊朗的谈判状况。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇪 Ireland is entering its eighth consecutive day of mass protests over soaring fuel prices, as residents describe being forced to cut back on basic heating costs just to get by. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇪 爱尔兰因燃料价格飙升引发的大规模抗议活动已进入第八天，居民们描述说，为了维持生计，他们被迫削减基本取暖费用。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇮🇶 Kurdistan24: A high‑level Iranian delegation has arrived in Baghdad to mediate between leaders of Iraq’s Shiite Coordination Framework and break the deadlock over the country’s next prime minister. The delegation is headed by Esmail Qaani, commander…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇰🇼 Kata’ib Hezbollah spokesperson Abu Mujahid al-Assaf praised Hezbollah’s steadfastness in the “40‑day war”, claiming it forced the US‑Israeli enemy to accept an agreement. He called for a new coordination mechanism between resistance forces to open new fronts against American and Israeli interests. The statement warned the Kuwaiti government over its treatment of a specific segment of the population during the war. On Iraq, it threatened that the security of the US embassy is conditional, and vowed to dismantle security institutions linked to the “occupation” and remove their influence from ministries. Regarding Iraq’s stalled government formation, the official said that if Nouri al‑Maliki or Mohammed Shia al‑Sudani cannot secure the premiership, the role should remain within their blocs to prevent one group from monopolising all four presidencies. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇮🇶 Kurdistan24：一个伊朗高级代表团已抵达巴格达，旨在伊拉克什叶派协调框架领导人之间进行调解，以打破该国下一任总理人选的僵局。该代表团由伊斯梅尔·卡尼（Esmail Qaani）指挥官率领……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇰🇼 真主党旅发言人阿布·穆贾希德·阿萨夫（Abu Mujahid al-Assaf）称赞了真主党在“40天战争”中的坚定立场，声称这迫使美以敌人接受了一项协议。他呼吁在抵抗力量之间建立新的协调机制，以开辟针对美国和以色列利益的新战线。该声明警告科威特政府在战争期间对待特定人口群体的做法。关于伊拉克，声明威胁称美国大使馆的安全是有条件的，并誓言要拆除与“占领者”有关的安全机构，并消除它们在各部委的影响力。关于伊拉克陷入僵局的组阁问题，该官员表示，如果努里·马利基（Nouri al-Maliki）或穆罕默德·希亚·苏达尼（Mohammed Shia al-Sudani）无法确保总理职位，该角色应保留在他们的集团内，以防止一个团体垄断所有四个总统职位。@wfwitness
